description: Azure DevOps integration hooks - lightweight SessionStart profile/data health check and role-based Azure DevOps work-item write validation. Matchers are namespace-agnostic: they match both the legacy 'mcp__azure-devops__*' and the current plugin-namespaced 'mcp__plugin_devops_azure-devops__*' tool names. No git-push gate — git pushes are unrestricted. (MCP error-recovery guidance is in devops/MCP_FAILURE_MODES.md; Claude Code has no per-tool-failure hook event.)
